name: Project Overview
query:
SELECT 
    p.name AS "Project ID",
    p.project_name AS "Project Name",
    p.status AS "Status",
    p.priority AS "Priority",
    p.start_date AS "Start Date",
    p.end_date AS "End Date",
    p.progress AS "Completion Percentage",
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tm.user) AS "Assigned Team",
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tabTask` t WHERE t.project = p.name AND t.status != 'Completed') AS "Pending Tasks",
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `tabTask` t WHERE t.project = p.name AND t.status = 'Completed') AS "Completed Tasks"
FROM `tabProject` p
LEFT JOIN `tabTeam Member` tm ON tm.parent = p.name
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY p.start_date DESC;
